nasb.text: But Jesus said to them, “Because of your hardness of heart he wrote you this commandment.

esv.text: And Jesus said to them, “Because of your hardness of heart he wrote you this commandment.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“因為你們的心硬，摩西才寫這條例給你們。

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“摩西因为你们心硬，才给你们写了这条诫命。

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“摩西因着你们的心里刚硬，才给你们定下这条诫命。
